description: v3.4.21: Release description auto-generation: new Generate button in Release Manager pre-populates the description field with changelog entries since the last published release, formatted as v{version}: {description} per line.v3.4.22: Fix Release Manager layout shift when generate hint appears: hint div now holds its space at all times using visibility instead of display, preventing the row from jumping.v3.4.23: Fix Release Manager row alignment: version column and Build button now have matching padding-bottom to compensate for the hint div height, keeping all three columns level.
